title: Respect prefers-reduced-motion Media Query
summary: Reduce or disable non-essential animations when prefers-reduced-motion is active.

tasks.description: Add @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) block that disables or reduces CSS animations and transitions.
acceptance_criteria: Animations disabled when prefers-reduced-motion is set
Transitions reduced to instant or minimal
Game is still fully functional without animations

testing_focus: Enable reduced motion in OS and verify no jarring animations
